"'''Indy Vault'''" is a recurring department of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine covering [[Lucasfilm]]'s [[Indiana Jones (franchise)|''Indiana Jones'']] series. "Indy Vault" is written by [[Jonathan W. Rinzler]].
